articles.summary: As the stock market reaches new highs, the potential for a correction could raise concerns for investors heavily exposed to equities.

articles.title: GENMO MOCHI FINE-TUNING
articles.summary: Mochi 1, the leading open source video model, has LoRA fine tuning available. It runs on a single GPU. This repository shows a number of uses, including custom effects and character consistency.

articles.title: ANTHROPIC INTRODUCES CUSTOM STYLES FOR PERSONALIZED RESPONSES
articles.summary: Anthropic now supports custom styles, allowing users to tailor the AI's responses to their communication preferences and workflows.

articles.title: OPENAI'S SORA VIDEO GENERATOR APPEARS TO HAVE LEAKED
articles.summary: A group leaked access to OpenAI's unreleased video generator Sora as a protest against alleged unfair practices and "art washing". They published a frontend on Hugging Face allowing users to generate videos, which OpenAI reportedly shut down after a few hours. OpenAI maintains that Sora is in research preview.

articles.title: FUGATTO SOUND MODEL
articles.summary: Nvidia has showcased a new 2B audio model that is far more flexible than previous models. It can mix and match audio, music, and speech in novel and interesting ways.

articles.title: OLMO2
articles.summary: A continuation of the fully open source training efforts, Allen AI has released a new generation of language models that are transparent from top to bottom. They match or surpass the best available open weight models.

articles.title: A UNIFIED MODEL FOR IMAGE GENERATION AND UNDERSTANDING
articles.summary: OneDiffusion is a large-scale diffusion model designed for a wide range of tasks, from text-to-image generation and image editing to reverse processes like depth estimation and segmentation.

articles.title: MOVING FROM THE CLOUD TO LOCAL DESKSIDE AI DEVELOPMENT
Save your spot for the live session (December 12)
CUSTOMIZED FLASH ATTENTION
articles.summary: New flash attention fork that can have ragged Q/V matrix sizes.

articles.title: NOVEL VIEW SYNTHESIS
articles.summary: MVGenMaster is a multi-view diffusion model designed to improve Novel View Synthesis tasks by integrating 3D priors.

articles.title: ADVANCING 3D MOLECULAR DESIGN
articles.summary: This work benchmarks discrete flow matching methods for generating novel 3D molecular structures, critical for chemical discovery.

articles.title: LLMS AS A JUDGE
articles.summary: This project explores the emerging "LLM-as-a-judge" paradigm where large language models are used for scoring, ranking, and selection tasks across various AI and NLP applications.

articles.title: WHEN WE BECOME COGS
articles.summary: AI boosts material scientists' efficiency, leading to a 44% increase in material discoveries but a 44% drop in work satisfaction due to reduced idea generation tasks. GitHub Copilot enhances productivity for less skilled developers, shifting focus from project management to coding. AI narrows skill gaps but risks alienation by automating creative tasks, echoing past automation impacts in various industries.

articles.title: AI ALONE ISN'T READY FOR CHIP DESIGN
articles.summary: Hybrid approaches that combine classical search methods and machine learning are showing promise in overcoming the complexities of chip design, particularly in floorplanning tasks. While AI alone struggles with multi-constraint scenarios, integrating AI for guiding search-based algorithms like simulated annealing enhances efficiency and effectiveness. This combination can accelerate design processes and enable more complex chip solutions.

articles.title: AI SUITE
articles.summary: An easy way to work with a variety of API based models in a single packaged environment.

articles.title: AMAZON TO INVEST ANOTHER $4 BILLION IN ANTHROPIC, OPENAI'S BIGGEST RIVAL
articles.summary: Amazon announced a $4 billion investment in Anthropic, bringing its total investment to $8 billion while establishing AWS as Anthropic's primary cloud and training partner.

articles.title: OPENAI IS FUNDING RESEARCH INTO 'AI MORALITY'
articles.summary: OpenAI is funding Duke University to research AI algorithms that predict human moral judgments.
